   Live Trax Series    Previous | Next 

Released on

Friday, November 18, 2022

Artwork

View all artwork (9) Â»
Live Trax Vol. 62: 6.25.10 - Blossom Music Center - Cuyahoga Falls, OH
Announced October 18, 2022.

Limited edition # out of 4000 pressed onto yellow vinyl was released November 25, 2022.

Official Original DMB Release Notes:
In 2009, after a solid year of touring in support of Big Whiskey and the Groogrux King, DMB had no intention of slowing down. The band traversed both Europe and the US in 2010. This setlist from the bandâs eleventh visit to Blossom Music Center stands apart from all other 2010 releases with its segues, teases and reprises. It is anything but straightforward and definitely a fun listen from top to bottom.

The color hex code for the Live Trax Vol. 62 ribbon is #e2c521.
